disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute severe holocephalic headache with a throbbing, burning, pressure quality, onset roughly 3 hours ago
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the headache for me?
When did it start and what does it feel like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's all over my head, a really bad throbbing burning pressure. It came on about three hours ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe photophobia and phonophobia — light and sound are intolerable
trigger_question_examples: Does light or noise bother you?
Are there any other symptoms along with the headache?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, any light feels like knives in my eyes and I can't stand any noise.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New cognitive slowing during this episode — brain fog and difficulty articulating thoughts
trigger_question_examples: Are you thinking clearly, or feeling confused at all?
Has your thinking, memory or ability to speak changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm really foggy, I can't get my words out properly and it's hard to think straight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Facial and neck flushing that preceded the headache
trigger_question_examples: Did anything happen just before the headache started?
Have you noticed any flushing or changes to your skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My face and neck went red and hot first, and then the headache hit.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Onset built up over about 3 hours rather than a single instantaneous maximal-intensity thunderclap moment
trigger_question_examples: Did it come on suddenly like a thunderclap in a split second, or build up over time?
Was it the worst headache of your life that hit maximum intensity instantly?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It built up over a couple of hours and kept getting worse — it didn't explode all at once.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'm not sure, it just came on.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Able to bring chin to chest on self-testing — no self-reported neck stiffness
trigger_question_examples: Can you gently try to touch your chin to your chest — does your neck feel stiff or painful?
Is your neck stiff when you bend it forwards?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I just tried — I can get my chin down to my chest okay, my neck isn't really stiff.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I haven't tried moving my neck.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No vomiting and no reduced level of consciousness — awake but cognitively slowed
trigger_question_examples: Have you vomited or felt like you're going to be sick?
Are you feeling drowsy or hard to keep awake?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No vomiting, and I'm awake — just really foggy and slow.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No limb weakness, numbness, facial droop or speech slurring
trigger_question_examples: Any weakness or numbness in your face, arms or legs?
Is your speech slurred, or is one side of your face drooping?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I can move everything fine and my face and speech are normal — I'm just slow because I'm foggy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever or shivering and no skin rash noticed
trigger_question_examples: Have you had a fever, chills or shivering?
Any rash on your skin — especially spots that don't fade when you press on them?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever or shivers that I've noticed, and no rash.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known history of mast cell / histamine flare-ups with prior similar but milder episodes
trigger_question_examples: Have you had episodes like this before?
Do you have any diagnosed medical conditions?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I get flares with my mast cell / histamine thing, but this one is worse than the usual ones.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Took paracetamol and ibuprofen about 2 hours ago with no relief
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for it?
Did any painkillers help at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took paracetamol and ibuprofen a couple of hours ago and it did absolutely nothing.
